form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Caulfield Vgold Sprint on March 14 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Jigsaw with 53kg at $10. Previously second-up second last of 14 at Caulfield Bm84 on June 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Zou Sensation carrying 58kg at $9. Did enough fresh and this suits much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 150m hampered and carried wider by She's Bulletproof.
Laid out under pressure in the straight.
Had difficulty obtaining clear running from the 400m until near the 250m.

form.formComment: Last start from last on the turn 6th of 12 at Flemington Bm78 on March 28 over 1100m, in the wet; 1.5 len behind Stoli Bolli with 58kg at $18. Before that 5th of 8 at Flemington Vg Comet on February 28 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Bridal Waltz with 54kg at $9. Rates highly today can run a much improved race.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Most recently gave a sight but was run down late 2nd in a small field at Caulfield Bm70 on April 4 over 1400m, long-neck behind Russian Meteor with 59.5kg at $3.30. The run before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 10 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 on March 25 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Trapdoor carrying 59.5kg at $3.40. Making headway. Will be very hard to run down.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 14 at Caulfield Bm78 on April 4 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Rue De Royale carrying 56kg at $41. The start before that got back early 7th of 9 at Cranbourne Bm78 on March 13 over 1200m, 7 len behind Mytemptation carrying 57kg at $10. Can be sneaking into the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from the 400m until passing the 150m.
Held up for clear running from the 500m until passing the 300m.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Geelong Bm66 October 23 over 1400m, soft track; 7 len behind Bluepinot with 61.5kg at $19. Previously first up; third of 8 at Kyneton Bm64 May 8 over 1203m, 0.9 len behind Tessa's Choice carrying 61.5kg at $15. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 4th of 12 at Ballarat Bm70 on April 3 over 1200m, 3 len behind Markdel carrying 57.5kg at $9. The start before that held ground to the line 3rd of 7 at Mt Gambier Bm66 on March 22 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Allinthetiming with 59.5kg at $4.60. Going well and can give cheek.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased from the start before settling at the rear.
Slow to begin and then hampered after the start.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming second last of 9 at Caulfield Heath Bm74 on March 4 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Nimbustwothousand with 54.5kg at $7. Second-up from last on the turn 6th of 10 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 on March 25 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Shaime carrying 58kg at $13. Possible improver now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages when being restrained.
Got its head up on jumping away. Laid in under pressure over the final 300m.
Slow to begin. Raced keenly in the middle stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 7 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 26 over 1000m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Romantic Miss with 59.5kg at $11. Before that won by 2 len at this track Bm56 March 17 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating The Last King carrying 58.5kg at $10. Risking.

form.formComment: Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 10 at this track Bm56 on March 17 over 1206m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Dobkins carrying 60kg at $51. The race before that second last of 12 at Colac 0-62 on February 6 over 1100m, 6 len behind Just Bolts carrying 58kg at $61. Looks tested in this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Laid in, in the straight.
Near the 300m shifted out before being straightened.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 2nd of 7 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 26 over 1000m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Romantic Miss carrying 57.5kg at $8.50. Previously second-up settled well back; won by a neck at Warrnambool Bm56 September 9 over 1000m in the wet defeating Rivkin carrying 59.5kg at $26. Harder here though and risking.
